channel.title: Obsidian on LinuxRepos
channel.description: Recent content in Obsidian on LinuxRepos

item.title: My Obsidian Setup
item.description: Notes are vital to our productivity but often people either take too many notes or none at all. I sought to fix this by using a simplistic approach in the Obsidian app. I’ve tried notion and a variety of other offerings that always fell flat. Let me show you how I set this app for maximum productivity.
